questions.question: Are you currently open to and actively exploring new opportunities?
questions.assesses: Filters out passive candidates who applied casually

questions.question: This is a full-time, on-site role at IIT Madras Campus, Chennai. Does this work for your current situation? Would relocation be needed?
What is your current CTC, and what are your salary expectations for this role?
questions.assesses: Budget alignment — prevents investing hours in mismatched candidates

questions.question: Do you currently hold any competing offers or are you in advanced stages with other companies? If so, what are your timelines?
questions.assesses: Urgency calibration — helps prioritize candidates who might slip away

questions.question: What is driving your decision to switch from your current role?
questions.assesses: Motivation check — red flags: purely money-driven, running from problems

questions.question: This role involves building backend systems for an AI-powered sports/fitness platform (Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS/K8s). How does this align with the kind of work you want to do next?
questions.assesses: Role-fit signal — tests if they actually read the JD
options: Strong match — this is exactly what I want
Partial match — interested but some gaps
Weak match — different from my goals

questions.question: How comfortable are you working in a small team (5-10 people) where you would own features end-to-end, from design through deployment?
questions.assesses: Culture fit — mid-level candidates from large orgs may struggle with breadth
options: Prefer larger teams with defined roles

questions.question: What is your notice period, and is there any flexibility to negotiate it down?
questions.assesses: Availability planning — Indian notice periods can be 30-90 days

questions.question: Have you worked with any of these specific technologies: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform? Briefly mention your level of hands-on experience.
questions.assesses: Quick stack alignment check — not pass/fail, helps rank for technical round

questions.question: Is there anything about this role or our setup that you would like clarity on before we proceed to the next round?
questions.assesses: Candidate engagement signal — good candidates ask thoughtful questions
